Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class ASTProblem

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.ASTProblem
public class ASTProblem extends Object
Describes a problem encountered when dealing with a formula.

This class is not intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.0

  • Constructor Details

    • ASTProblem

      public ASTProblem(SourceLocation location, ProblemKind msg, int severity, Object... args)
      Parameters:
      location - the location of this error or warning
      msg - the problem of this problem
      severity - the severity of the problem
      args - the additional arguments needed to describe the problem. These arguments are best described here ProblemKind
